name: David Kim
bio: Former team lead who guided me during my first job. We enjoy discussing startups and technology trends.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: My cousin who lives in Manchester. We grew up together and still share recipes and travel stories.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: A talented UX designer from Tokyo. We collaborate on creative side projects and attend design meetups.

name: James Wright
bio: Met during a backpacking trip across Europe. We often plan future adventures and share photography tips.

name: Sophia Martinez
bio: My college roommate from Barcelona. We bonded over late-night study sessions and still catch up regularly.

name: Michael Chen
bio: A neighbor and workout partner who keeps me motivated with early morning training sessions.

name: Aisha Rahman
bio: We met while volunteering at a local community center. She is passionate about education and social impact.

name: Daniel O'Connor
bio: My bandmate from a local indie group. We regularly jam together and perform at weekend gigs.

name: Olivia Bennett
bio: Met at a neighborhood book club. We enjoy discussing contemporary fiction over coffee.

name: Carlos Mendoza
bio: A travel photographer I met in Peru. We stay in touch to share stories and plan future expeditions.

name: Hannah Fischer
bio: We met through a language exchange program. She helps me practice German while I help her with English.

name: Noah Patel
bio: A colleague from a startup incubator. We often brainstorm business ideas and attend networking events.
